content:
Based on the project brief: 'Je veux juste que tu crées un employé pour tester et qu'il produise une petite news de 5 lignes sur le climat 
rien de plus, quelque chose de très cours', execute your role: Produce a strict 5-line climate news draft for validation..

Global temperatures have surged past critical thresholds, triggering unprecedented heatwaves across multiple continents.
Scientists warn that accelerating ice melt in polar regions threatens coastal cities worldwide within decades.
International leaders convene this week to finalize binding emissions targets aimed at limiting warming to 1.5°C.
Renewable energy investments hit record highs as nations accelerate their transition away from fossil fuels.
Experts emphasize that immediate policy action remains crucial to prevent irreversible ecological damage.

Based on the project brief: 'Je veux juste que tu crées un employé pour tester et qu'il produise une petite news de 5 lignes sur le climat 
rien de plus, quelque chose de très cours
recommence et fais une deuxieme news courte de 5 lignes sur le foot', execute your role: Produce a strict 5-line climate news draft for validation..

Global carbon emissions plateaued last quarter amid stricter industrial regulations.
Ocean acidification levels continue to rise, threatening marine biodiversity hotspots.
New satellite data confirms accelerated glacier retreat in the Himalayan region.
Governments pledge increased funding for drought-resistant agricultural technologies.
Experts stress that rapid decarbonization remains essential to meet Paris Agreement goals.

Based on the project brief: 'Je veux juste que tu crées un employé pour tester et qu'il produise une petite news de 5 lignes sur le climat 
rien de plus, quelque chose de très cours
recommence et fais une deuxieme news courte de 5 lignes sur le foot', execute your role: Produce a strict 5-line climate news draft for validation..

Global sea levels rose by 4.5 millimeters last year due to thermal expansion and ice sheet loss.
Extreme weather events cost economies over $300 billion, prompting urgent infrastructure upgrades.
Carbon capture technology deployment accelerates as major industries seek net-zero compliance.
Deforestation rates in the Amazon drop slightly following new international conservation agreements.
Climate scientists urge policymakers to prioritize adaptation strategies alongside emission reductions.

PROJECT ITERATION: v2
CURRENT PROJECT BRIEF: 'Je veux juste que tu crées un résumé de 2 news, une sur le climat, une autre sur la coupe du monde de football 2026. Rien de plus, quelque chose de court, 5 lignes par news pas plus. '

TEAM CONTEXT & HISTORY:


YOUR TASK: Produce a strict 5-line climate news draft for validation.
Execute your production focusing on current iteration requirements.

Global average temperatures breached 1.5°C above pre-industrial levels for the first full calendar year.
Accelerating Arctic ice loss is disrupting jet stream patterns, intensifying extreme weather events worldwide.
Major economies announced a joint $500 billion fund to accelerate renewable energy grid modernization.
Ocean heat content reached record highs, severely impacting coral reef ecosystems and fisheries globally.
Scientists warn that without immediate emission cuts, irreversible tipping points could be triggered by 2035.

PROJECT ITERATION: v3
CURRENT PROJECT BRIEF: 'Je veux juste que tu crées un résumé de 2 news, une sur la formule 1 en 2026, une autre sur Max Verstapen. Rien de plus, quelque chose de court, 5 lignes par news pas plus. '

TEAM CONTEXT & HISTORY:


YOUR TASK: Produce a strict 5-line climate news draft for validation.
Execute your production focusing on current iteration requirements.

Global methane emissions surge to record highs, driven by agricultural expansion and fossil fuel extraction.
New climate models predict intensified monsoon variability, threatening food security across South Asia.
European Union finalizes landmark carbon border tax, reshaping global trade and manufacturing incentives.
Renewable capacity additions outpace coal retirements for the third consecutive year worldwide.
Experts caution that delayed adaptation measures will disproportionately impact vulnerable island nations.
